name: Deis Hills Park
description: Deis Hills Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dover, OH. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Strasburg 6 Pickleball Courts & 1 Tennis Court
description: Strasburg 6 Pickleball Courts & 1 Tennis Court is a place to play pickleball in Strasburg, OH. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Tuscarawas County YMCA
description: Tuscarawas County YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Dover, OH. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, locker rooms, water, and youth programming.

name: Tuscora Park
description: Come play pickleball at Tuscora Park in New Philadelphia, OH! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
